languages.original_text: "I grieve with you, Magos Haneumann, and offer prayers to the Motive Force that it forever flows in abundance through the plasteel veins of Eufrates II. But despite the losses, the world endured, as Stygies VIII once endured. In time, it was able to recover, and so too will Eufrates II."

languages.text: "Я скорблю вместе с тобой, магос Ханейманн, и возношу молебны Движущей Силе, чтобы она не иссякла в пласталевых венах Ефрата-II. Но, несмотря на утраты, мир выстоял, как выстояла некогда Стигия VIII. Со временем она смогла оправиться, а значит сможет и Ефрат-II".

"I grieve with you, Magos Haneumann, and offer prayers to the Motive Force that it forever flows in abundance through the plasteel veins of Eufrates II. But despite the losses, the world endured, as Stygies VIII once endured. In time, it was able to recover, and so too will Eufrates II."

"I grieve with you, Magos Haneumann, and offer prayers to the Motive Force that it forever flows in abundance through the plasteel veins of Eufrates II. But despite the losses, the world endured, as Stygies VIII once endured. In time, it was able to recover, and so too will Eufrates II."

"I grieve with you, Magos Haneumann, and offer prayers to the Motive Force that it forever flows in abundance through the plasteel veins of Eufrates II. But despite the losses, the world endured, as Stygies VIII once endured. In time, it was able to recover, and so too will Eufrates II."

languages.text: «Me lamento con usted, magos Haneumann, y ofrezco plegarias a la Fuerza Motriz para que siempre fluya en abundancia por las venas de plastiacero de Eufrates II. Pero, a pesar de las pérdidas, el mundo ha sobrevivido, al igual que hizo Stygies VIII. Con el tiempo, fue capaz de recuperarse, y eso mismo hará Eufrates II».
languages.original_text: "I grieve with you, Magos Haneumann, and offer prayers to the Motive Force that it forever flows in abundance through the plasteel veins of Eufrates II. But despite the losses, the world endured, as Stygies VIII once endured. In time, it was able to recover, and so too will Eufrates II."

traits.locale_text: «Me lamento con usted, magos Haneumann, y ofrezco plegarias a la Fuerza Motriz para que siempre fluya en abundancia por las venas de plastiacero de Eufrates II. Pero, a pesar de las pérdidas, el mundo ha sobrevivido, al igual que hizo Stygies VIII. Con el tiempo, fue capaz de recuperarse, y eso mismo hará Eufrates II».

languages.text: 「あなたと共に嘆き悲しみます、マゴス・ハネウマン。そして、モーティヴ・フォースがエウフラテスIIのプラスティールの血管を、永遠に豊かに流れ続けるよう祈りを捧げます。しかし、損失にもかかわらず、かつてスタイジーズVIIIが耐え抜いたように、あの世界も持ちこたえました。やがてそれは回復しえたのです。エウフラテスIIもまた、そうなるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "I grieve with you, Magos Haneumann, and offer prayers to the Motive Force that it forever flows in abundance through the plasteel veins of Eufrates II. But despite the losses, the world endured, as Stygies VIII once endured. In time, it was able to recover, and so too will Eufrates II."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたと共に嘆き悲しみます、マゴス・ハネウマン。そして、モーティヴ・フォースがエウフラテスIIのプラスティールの血管を、永遠に豊かに流れ続けるよう祈りを捧げます。しかし、損失にもかかわらず、かつてスタイジーズVIIIが耐え抜いたように、あの世界も持ちこたえました。やがてそれは回復しえたのです。エウフラテスIIもまた、そうなるでしょう」

languages.text: “我与你同悲，哈努曼贤者。我向源力祈祷，愿它在欧夫拉茨二号星的塑钢血脉中川流不息。尽管损失惨重，可这个世界还是渡过了难关，正如曾经的斯泰吉斯8号那般。时间能够治愈斯泰吉斯8号，也必将治愈欧夫拉茨二号星。”
languages.original_text: "I grieve with you, Magos Haneumann, and offer prayers to the Motive Force that it forever flows in abundance through the plasteel veins of Eufrates II. But despite the losses, the world endured, as Stygies VIII once endured. In time, it was able to recover, and so too will Eufrates II."

traits.locale_text: “我与你同悲，哈努曼贤者。我向源力祈祷，愿它在欧夫拉茨二号星的塑钢血脉中川流不息。尽管损失惨重，可这个世界还是渡过了难关，正如曾经的斯泰吉斯8号那般。时间能够治愈斯泰吉斯8号，也必将治愈欧夫拉茨二号星。”

languages.text: "Ich leide mit Euch, Magos Haneumann, und bete zur Antriebskraft, dass sie auf ewig in den Plastahlvenen von Eufrates II fließen möge. Aber trotz der Verluste hat die Welt überlebt wie Stygies VIII einst überlebt hat. Irgendwann hat sich der Planet erholt, und das wird auch Eufrates II gelingen."
languages.original_text: "I grieve with you, Magos Haneumann, and offer prayers to the Motive Force that it forever flows in abundance through the plasteel veins of Eufrates II. But despite the losses, the world endured, as Stygies VIII once endured. In time, it was able to recover, and so too will Eufrates II."

traits.locale_text: "Ich leide mit Euch, Magos Haneumann, und bete zur Antriebskraft, dass sie auf ewig in den Plastahlvenen von Eufrates II fließen möge. Aber trotz der Verluste hat die Welt überlebt wie Stygies VIII einst überlebt hat. Irgendwann hat sich der Planet erholt, und das wird auch Eufrates II gelingen."

languages.text: « Je partage votre chagrin, magos Haneumann, et j'offre mes prières à la Force Motrice. Puisse-t-elle éternellement couler en abondance dans les veines de plastacier d'Eufrates II. Mais en dépit des pertes, ce monde perdure, tout comme Stygies VIII autrefois. Le temps y a fait son œuvre, comme ce sera le cas pour Eufrates II. »
languages.original_text: "I grieve with you, Magos Haneumann, and offer prayers to the Motive Force that it forever flows in abundance through the plasteel veins of Eufrates II. But despite the losses, the world endured, as Stygies VIII once endured. In time, it was able to recover, and so too will Eufrates II."

traits.locale_text: « Je partage votre chagrin, magos Haneumann, et j'offre mes prières à la Force Motrice. Puisse-t-elle éternellement couler en abondance dans les veines de plastacier d'Eufrates II. Mais en dépit des pertes, ce monde perdure, tout comme Stygies VIII autrefois. Le temps y a fait son œuvre, comme ce sera le cas pour Eufrates II. »

languages.text: "Seninle birlikte kederleniyorum Magos Haneumann ve Eufrates II'nin plasçelik damarlarından sonsuza dek bolluk içinde akması için Devinim Gücü'ne dua ediyorum. Ancak kayıplara rağmen dünya, tıpkı bir zamanlar Stygies VIII'in dayandığı gibi dayandı. Zamanla iyileşebildi. Eufrates II de iyileşecektir."
languages.original_text: "I grieve with you, Magos Haneumann, and offer prayers to the Motive Force that it forever flows in abundance through the plasteel veins of Eufrates II. But despite the losses, the world endured, as Stygies VIII once endured. In time, it was able to recover, and so too will Eufrates II."
